key.name: background-alpha
key.summary: Dark tint opacity 0–1 (lower=more transparent glass, e.g. 0.15)

key.name: border-alpha
key.summary: Dark edge line opacity (0=off, avoids white blur halo)

key.name: unblur-in-overview
key.summary: Disable blur while Activities overview is open

key.name: sync-dock-opacity
key.summary: Set Ubuntu Dock background opacity to 0 while active
